title: Oil pipelines around the Strait of Hormuz won't end the threat Iran poses to Middle East crude exports
summary_full: Oil producers are building or contemplating new pipeline projects to bypass the Strait of Hormuz, but this infrastructure is still vulnerable, analysts said.
summary_public: Oil producers are building or contemplating new pipeline projects to bypass the Strait of Hormuz, but this infrastructure is still vulnerable, analysts said.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran poses to Middle East crude exports
